---
title: "Posts"
description-meta: "News, papers, events, and updates from Prof. Ibrahim Niankara"
title-block-banner: false
listing:
  contents: posts
  sort: "date desc"
  type: default
  categories: true
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
  fields: [image, date, title, description, categories]
page-layout: full
---
